description: NinjaTrader 8 is running on the Windows desktop with real daily OHLCV data available for AAPL. A technical analyst needs a Point & Figure chart to identify significant support/resistance levels without the noise of time-based charts. Configure a chart for 'AAPL' using the Point & Figure bar type with a Box size of 2 and a Reversal of 3. Add a Simple Moving Average (SMA) indicator with a Period of 20 to the chart and save the workspace. Login credentials: Docker / GymAnything123!
